민수기 10:2.content: “Make two trumpets of silver. You shall make them of beaten work. You shall use them for the calling of the congregation, and for the journeying of the camps.

민수기 10:3.content: When they blow them, all the congregation shall gather themselves to you at the door of the Tent of Meeting.

민수기 10:4.content: If they blow just one, then the princes, the heads of the thousands of Israel, shall gather themselves to you.

민수기 10:5.content: When you blow an alarm, the camps that lie on the east side shall go forward.

민수기 10:6.content: When you blow an alarm the second time, the camps that lie on the south side shall go forward. They shall blow an alarm for their journeys.

민수기 10:7.content: But when the assembly is to be gathered together, you shall blow, but you shall not sound an alarm.

민수기 10:8.content: “The sons of Aaron, the priests, shall blow the trumpets. This shall be to you for a statute forever throughout your generations.

민수기 10:9.content: When you go to war in your land against the adversary who oppresses you, then you shall sound an alarm with the trumpets. Then you will be remembered before Yahweh your God, and you will be saved from your enemies.

민수기 10:10.content: “Also in the day of your gladness, and in your set feasts, and in the beginnings of your months, you shall blow the trumpets over your burnt offerings, and over the sacrifices of your peace offerings; and they shall be to you for a memorial before your God. I am Yahweh your God.”

민수기 10:11.content: In the second year, in the second month, on the twentieth day of the month, the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle of the covenant.

민수기 10:12.content: The children of Israel went forward on their journeys out of the wilderness of Sinai; and the cloud stayed in the wilderness of Paran.

민수기 10:13.content: They first went forward according to the commandment of Yahweh by Moses.

민수기 10:14.content: First, the standard of the camp of the children of Judah went forward according to their armies. Nahshon the son of Amminadab was over his army.

민수기 10:15.content: Nethanel the son of Zuar was over the army of the tribe of the children of Issachar.

민수기 10:16.content: Eliab the son of Helon was over the army of the tribe of the children of Zebulun.

민수기 10:17.content: The tabernacle was taken down; and the sons of Gershon and the sons of Merari, who bore the tabernacle, went forward.

민수기 10:18.content: The standard of the camp of Reuben went forward according to their armies. Elizur the son of Shedeur was over his army.

민수기 10:19.content: Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai was over the army of the tribe of the children of Simeon.

민수기 10:20.content: Eliasaph the son of Deuel was over the army of the tribe of the children of Gad.

민수기 10:21.content: The Kohathites set forward, bearing the sanctuary. The others set up the tabernacle before they arrived.

민수기 10:22.content: The standard of the camp of the children of Ephraim set forward according to their armies. Elishama the son of Ammihud was over his army.

민수기 10:23.content: Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur was over the army of the tribe of the children of Manasseh.

민수기 10:24.content: Abidan the son of Gideoni was over the army of the tribe of the children of Benjamin.

민수기 10:25.content: The standard of the camp of the children of Dan, which was the rear guard of all the camps, set forward according to their armies. Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai was over his army.

민수기 10:26.content: Pagiel the son of Ochran was over the army of the tribe of the children of Asher.

민수기 10:27.content: Ahira the son of Enan was over the army of the tribe of the children of Naphtali.

민수기 10:28.content: Thus were the travels of the children of Israel according to their armies; and they went forward.

민수기 10:29.content: Moses said to Hobab, the son of Reuel the Midianite, Moses’ father-in-law, “We are journeying to the place of which Yahweh said, ‘I will give it to you.’ Come with us, and we will treat you well; for Yahweh has spoken good concerning Israel.”

민수기 10:30.content: He said to him, “I will not go; but I will depart to my own land, and to my relatives.”

민수기 10:31.content: Moses said, “Don’t leave us, please; because you know how we are to encamp in the wilderness, and you can be our eyes.

민수기 10:32.content: It shall be, if you go with us—yes, it shall be—that whatever good Yahweh does to us, we will do the same to you.”

민수기 10:33.content: They set forward from the Mount of Yahweh three days’ journey. The ark of Yahweh’s covenant went before them three days’ journey, to seek out a resting place for them.

민수기 10:34.content: The cloud of Yahweh was over them by day, when they set forward from the camp.

민수기 10:35.content: When the ark went forward, Moses said, “Rise up, Yahweh, and let your enemies be scattered! Let those who hate you flee before you!”

민수기 10:36.content: When it rested, he said, “Return, Yahweh, to the ten thousands of the thousands of Israel.”
